data.body:
[Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]

A Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment will begin on 6/3 (Tue)!

💌Pick-Up Student: 3★ Utaha (Cheer Squad), 3★ Kotori (Cheer Squad), 3★ Noa, 3★ Haruna (Track)
🗓️Pick-Up Recruitment Schedule: 6/3 (Tue) 2:00 – 6/10 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
